title: schizaea dichotoma var. forsteri
intro: Schizaea dichotoma var. forsteri, also known as Forster's fork fern, is a variety of the Schizaea dichotoma species of fern, native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Schizaea dichotoma var. forsteri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in modern herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
